# Named model and AI method registry

## MATH-FUN — *Funnellus Probabilisticus*

**Plain name:** Funnel probability model

**Description:** Models video performance as a chain of behavioural gates.

## MATH-BAY — *Machina Bayesiana Decisionis*

**Plain name:** Bayesian decision engine

**Description:** Posterior scale/replicate/rewrite/kill decisions.

## MATH-BND — *Allocator Thompsonianus*

**Plain name:** Thompson sampling bandit

**Description:** Allocates creative effort between exploration and exploitation.

## MATH-SEQ — *Inferentia Sequentia*

**Plain name:** Sequential testing control

**Description:** Prevents invalid conclusions from constant peeking.

## MATH-CONF — *Intervallum Conformale*

**Plain name:** Conformal prediction intervals

**Description:** Adds uncertainty intervals to AI predictions.

## MATH-PWR — *Calculus Expositionis*

**Plain name:** Exposure/power planner

**Description:** Estimates exposure needed for useful tests.

## AI-GEN — *Genoma Creativum Vectoris*

**Plain name:** Creative genome embeddings

**Description:** Clusters videos by mechanism and outcome.

## AI-CRIT — *Concilium Criticorum*

**Plain name:** LLM critic council

**Description:** Reviews hook, trust, cognition, CTA, and series fit.

## AI-RET — *Praedictor Retentionis*

**Plain name:** Retention forecaster

**Description:** Predicts likely CTV/APV/CPL ranges before posting.

## AI-ORCH — *Orchestrator Experimentorum*

**Plain name:** Experiment orchestrator

**Description:** Registers tests, variants, checkpoints, and decisions.
